source_jobs.title: Execution Research Fellow, Summer / Fall 2026
Opportunistic - Investment Teams
source_jobs.description: <div class="content-intro"><p>Founded in 1999, Viking Global Investors (“Viking”) is a global investment firm with a long-term, fundamental, research-intensive approach to investing. Viking manages ~$52 billion of capital across public and private investments. Viking has offices in Stamford, New York, Hong Kong, London, and San Francisco, and is registered as an investment adviser with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission. For more information, please visit <a href="https://vikingglobal.com" target="_blank">vikingglobal.com</a>.</p></div><p>We are always interested in speaking with qualified individuals who wish to pursue a career at Viking.&nbsp; If you wish to discuss career opportunities in <a href="https://vikingglobal.com/public-equity/" target="_blank">Public Equity</a>, <a href="https://vikingglobal.com/private-equity/" target="_blank">Private Equity</a>, or <a href="https://vikingglobal.com/credit/" target="_blank">Credit and Structured Capital</a>, please follow the steps below.</p>
